description.value: Cost: Free Effect: Shout an Alarm, point out a subject, or other very quick communication. Can only be done once per turn as a [Free] Action. Longer communication requires an [Interact] action.

system.effect: Shout an Alarm, point out a subject, or other very quick communication. Can only be done once per turn as a [Free] Action. Longer communication requires an [Interact] action.
